name: annotated_screenshot
title: annotated_screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot with numbered Set-of-Marks labels drawn on interactive elements (zero ML, instant). Returns the annotated image and a text index with click coordinates.

appName.description: Target application name. If omitted, uses the frontmost application

name: apps
title: apps
description: List all running foreground applications with their name, PID, frontmost status, and visibility

name: batch
title: batch
description: Execute multiple computer control actions in sequence within a single request. Reduces round-trip latency for multi-step workflows.

actions.description: Array of actions to execute sequentially

name: click
title: click
description: Click an element by @eN index (AX API), text query (AX find + coordinate click), or x/y coordinates (CGEvent fallback)

index.description: Element index from snapshot @eN reference (e.g. 0 for @e0). Uses AX API.

query.description: Text query to find and click element (AX find then click at center coordinates)

x.description: X coordinate for direct coordinate click (CGEvent fallback)

y.description: Y coordinate for direct coordinate click (CGEvent fallback)

name: context
title: context
description: Get orientation context: frontmost app, window title, focused element. Helps agents understand the current state before acting.

name: drag
title: drag
description: Drag from one element to another using @eN snapshot references

duration.description: Duration of the drag in milliseconds

name: element_at
title: element_at
description: Identify what element is at a specific screen coordinate. Returns full metadata: role, name, value, position, size, actions, and owning app.

name: fill
title: fill
description: Set the value of an input element directly (bypasses character-by-character typing). Use for text fields, text areas, and other editable elements.

name: find
title: find
description: Find elements in the AX tree by name, role, or value. Returns matching elements with position and metadata.

query.description: Text query to search for (matches name, value, or description)

role.description: Filter by AX role (e.g. "AXButton", "AXTextField"). Can omit "AX" prefix.

name: focus
title: focus
description: Set keyboard focus to an element identified by @eN index

name: get_attribute
title: get_attribute
description: Get a specific accessibility attribute from an element by @eN index

name: get_content
title: get_content
description: Get the text content of the current window from the frontmost (or specified) application. Returns app name, window title, and all visible text.

appName.description: Target application name. If omitted, uses the frontmost application

name: get_element_info
title: get_element_info
description: Get comprehensive information about an element: role, name, value, position, size, enabled, focused, child count, and available actions

name: get_text
title: get_text
description: Get the text content of an element by @eN index. Returns the element's value, name, title, or description — whichever is available.

name: hotkey
title: hotkey
description: Press a key combination like Cmd+L, Cmd+Return, Cmd+Shift+P. Modifiers are held while the final key is pressed.

keys.description: Key combination as array, last element is the key, rest are modifiers. E.g. ["cmd", "shift", "p"] for Cmd+Shift+P

name: hover
title: hover
description: Move the mouse cursor to hover over an element identified by @eN index

name: inspect
title: inspect
description: Get complete metadata for one element: role, subrole, name, value, description, help text, position, size, actions, DOM id, identifier, editable state, and owning app. Accepts @eN index or x/y coordinates.

x.description: X coordinate to inspect element at point

y.description: Y coordinate to inspect element at point

name: is_enabled
title: is_enabled
description: Check if an element is enabled (not disabled/grayed out)

name: is_visible
title: is_visible
description: Check if an element is visible (has non-zero bounds and is within the screen area)

name: long_press
title: long_press
description: Press and hold at an element or coordinates for a duration. Useful for context menus, Force Touch previews, and drag initiation.

x.description: X coordinate for direct coordinate long press

y.description: Y coordinate for direct coordinate long press

name: mouse
title: mouse
description: Low-level mouse control: move, click, double-click, right-click, mouse down/up at specific screen coordinates

action.description: Mouse action to perform (supported values: move, click, doubleClick, rightClick, mouseDown, mouseUp)

name: open_app
title: open_app
description: Open (activate) a macOS application by name. If already running, brings it to the foreground.

name: press
title: press
description: Press a keyboard key or shortcut (e.g. Cmd+C, Enter, Escape). Works globally — sends to the frontmost application.

key.description: Key to press. Single character ("a", "1") or named key ("return", "escape", "tab", "space", "delete", "up", "down", "left", "right", "f1"-"f12", "home", "end", "pageup", "pagedown")

modifiers.description: Modifier keys to hold. Array of: "command"/"cmd", "shift", "option"/"alt", "control"/"ctrl"

name: read
title: read
description: Extract text content from any app window or element subtree, with depth control for nested content. Recursively collects visible text from static text, text fields, headings, and links.

index.description: Element index from snapshot @eN reference. If omitted, reads from the frontmost window.

maxDepth.description: Maximum depth for nested content extraction

name: record_audio
title: record_audio
description: Record system audio + microphone to a WAV file. Flow: call with `action: "start"` to begin, then optionally `pause` / `resume`, and finally `stop` to receive the WAV file path. Use `cancel` to discard, or `status` to query the current session.

action.description: Action to perform on the audio recording session (supported values: start, pause, resume, stop, cancel, status)

outputPath.description: Output file path without extension. Only used by "start". Defaults to ~/Documents/.enconvo/MeetingRecordings/Recording-<timestamp>

includingApplications.description: Bundle IDs of apps to include in system audio capture. Empty array records all running apps. Only used by "start" and only when recordSystemAudio is true.

recordMicrophone.description: Capture the microphone. Only used by "start".

recordSystemAudio.description: Capture system audio via ScreenCaptureKit. Only used by "start".

waitForCompletion.description: When true, "start" blocks until the user clicks stop/cancel in the audio bar UI (or another caller issues stop/cancel), then returns the final result. Set to false to return immediately after recording begins. Only used by "start".

name: run_applescript
title: run_applescript
description: Execute an AppleScript or JXA (JavaScript for Automation) script and return the result

name: screenshot
title: screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot of the entire screen and return as a displayable image

name: scroll
title: scroll
description: Scroll the page in a direction or scroll a specific element into view

direction.description: Scroll direction (supported values: up, down, left, right)

amount.description: Scroll amount (number of scroll units, each ~3 lines)

index.description: Element index to scroll into view (overrides direction/amount). Uses @eN ref from snapshot.

name: snapshot
title: snapshot
description: Generate an accessibility tree snapshot with @eN references using the AX API with semantic depth tunneling.

interactiveOnly.description: Only include interactive elements (buttons, inputs, etc.) in the tree

maxDepth.description: Maximum UI tree traversal depth (uses semantic depth tunneling — empty layout containers cost 0)

appName.description: Target application name. If omitted, uses the frontmost application

pid.description: Target process ID. Overrides appName if specified

name: state
title: state
description: List every running app with its windows, positions, and sizes. Provides a unified view of the entire desktop state.

name: status
title: status
description: Get the current status of the computer control module: cached element count, target app, and running apps summary

name: type
title: type
description: Type text character by character using keyboard events. Optionally focus an element first by @eN index.

index.description: Element index to focus before typing. If omitted, types into the currently focused element

delay.description: Delay between keystrokes in milliseconds. 0 for instant.

name: wait
title: wait
description: Wait for a condition to be met (element appears/disappears, title changes, or fixed delay). Polls at the specified interval until timeout.

condition.description: Condition to wait for (supported values: elementExists, elementGone, titleContains, titleChanged, delay)

value.description: Value to match against (element name, title substring)

name: window
title: window
description: Manage application windows: list, minimize, maximize, restore, close, move, or resize any window.

action.description: Action to perform (supported values: list, minimize, maximize, restore, close, move, resize, fullscreen)

appName.description: Target application name. If omitted, uses the frontmost app

window.description: Window title substring to match. If omitted, targets the first window

name: windows
title: windows
description: List all windows of an application with their index, title, position, size, and minimized status

appName.description: Application name. If omitted, lists windows of the frontmost app
